title: Create Aeronautics [Offroad] Addon: StickyWheels
description: A Minecraft addon that adds a sticky honey-based wheel allowing vehicles to stick to any surface, including vertical walls and upside-down paths. The wheels come in 4 sizes, like off-road variants, and are fully craftable.
body:
This addon introduces a special sticky wheel made from honey that lets vehicles maintain grip on any surface.

With these wheels, you can drive on walls, ceilings, and inverted tracks without losing stability.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f74cf8dbfd44a5561ea6b3c94b49bf77c5b47b64.gif)

The wheels are available in four different sizes, similar to off-road wheels, to fit various vehicle types.

![Tire Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0713c68d1a1a9b7e00cedb86e4894dc272e35c7f_0.webp)


They can be crafted using honey as the main material.
